tax: Placed at genus rank, Flameling is defined by composition and formation mechanics, not by colour, size, or danger: a leaping open-flame body. A new species belongs here only if it shows a flame-ball body.
ap: The grouping is recognised by a bobbing flame-ball. A field surveyor confirms membership from at least one persistent marker — scorch-rings and soot films — which survives even when the body disperses.
eco: Flameling occupies gas-seep vents and oil stores. Persistence is elemental rather than reproductive: members form where a spark ignites a fuel pocket and recur with the vent refills with fuel, sustaining themselves on open combustion.
beh: Across the grouping, behaviour is the disturbance-response of the medium: flits along fuel and ignites contact. Roles, moods, and summoning circumstances are recorded on the entries below, not treated as new taxa.
traitsText: Shared characters: open-flame body and bright self-light. These are grouping-level traits only; specific resistances, abilities, and field signs belong to each species and species beneath this node.
abilities: Grouping-level abilities are the broad capacities implied by the shared body: ignition, leaping spread, and dazzle. Named, bounded powers are assigned to the species that actually possess them.
bg: In the Throat, Flameling matters because spreads fire through gas and oil. It lets survey reports sort leaping flame forms from creeping ones without collapsing distinct hazards into one vague label.
g: Flameling is the genus-rank grouping of leaping flame-ball elementals within the True Elementals. Its members share a darting open-flame body that ignites and spreads, and divide below into species groups by fuel colour and flame size. A self-feeding ball of fire.
